metadata.policy: No migration, deletion, or Git history rewrite is authorized by this plan.

migration_blockers: explicit human migration approval has not been granted
required_preconditions: committed producer/consumer manifest row with source graph, parameters, and consumers
explicit human approval for Git LFS or release-asset migration
canonical decision/gate artifacts retain the scientific conclusion without the large slice payload
label, leakage, transfer, and performance regressions stay green after payload restoration
rollback_expectations: restore the exact geometry/retrieval JSON path and SHA-256
rerun geometry evaluation, label-factory gates, tests, and validate for affected slices

rollback_expectations: restore the exact path from object storage using the recorded SHA-256
rerun Foldseek readiness or duplicate-screen checks that consume the sidecar
